issue_text:
Previously in v21.3
```py
>>> from packaging.markers import Marker
>>> marker=Marker('extra == "opt-feature"')
>>> marker.evaluate({"extra": None})
False
```

With v22.0, we get,
```py
>>> from packaging.markers import Marker
>>> marker=Marker('extra == "opt-feature"')
>>> marker.evaluate({"extra": None})
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "<stdin>", line 1, in <module>
  File "/home/rth/.miniforge/envs/pyodide-env/lib/python3.10/site-packages/packaging/markers.py", line 24
success_criteria: Marker.evaluate 在 extra 为 None 时应返回 False 而不是抛出 TypeError；普通 extra 匹配行为不回归；回归测试全部通过。
